name: GEICO 500
comments: Kyle Busch won the Geico 500 at Talladega Superspeedway, his 62nd career NASCAR Cup Series victory. Prior to the start of the race, the following cars dropped to the rear of the field for the reasons indicated: #2, 16 and 36 (unapproved adjustments).
